tasks.instruction: Wybierz poprawna odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem: The artist, _________ paintings are displayed in the national gallery, never became famous during his lifetime.
She told me that she _________ the report by the following Monday.
Teacher: Why didn't you submit your essay? Student: I wish I _________ more time to work on it last week.
The new hospital is expected _________ by the end of next year.
Kate: Do you know where the concert is? Mike: It's the hall _________ the charity event took place last spring.
If only the government _________ more in education, the situation would be different now.
